hero.title: Join the Adon ERP Partner Program
hero.description: Expand your implementation, consulting, or reseller business. Access training, certification, co-marketing support, and a global network of partners.

partnerTypes.title: Implementation Partners
partnerTypes.description: Help customers deploy and configure Adon ERP to fit their business needs.

partnerTypes.title: Consulting Partners
partnerTypes.description: Provide strategic advisory services to help customers get the most from Adon ERP.

partnerTypes.title: Reseller Partners
partnerTypes.description: Offer Adon ERP solutions to your customers with margin and white-label options.

items.title: Training & Certification
items.description: Comprehensive programs to upskill your team on Adon ERP.

items.title: Global Network
items.description: Connect with 1000+ partners worldwide and expand your reach.

items.title: Revenue Growth
items.description: Multiple revenue streams through implementation, consulting, and resale.

items.title: Technical Support
items.description: Priority support and technical resources for your implementations.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit your partnership application and company information.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: Our team reviews your application and verifies your capabilities.

steps.title: Onboard
steps.description: Get access to training, resources, and the partner portal.

steps.title: Grow
steps.description: Start delivering Adon ERP solutions and grow your business.

questions.question: What are the eligibility requirements?
questions.answer: Requirements vary by partner type. Generally, we look for companies with relevant implementation experience and a commitment to customer success.

questions.question: How much does it cost to become a partner?
questions.answer: Adon ERP has a tiered partner program with no upfront costs for initial tiers. Revenue share and margin structures vary by partner level.

questions.question: Do you offer training programs?
questions.answer: Yes! We provide comprehensive training programs, certifications, and ongoing technical support for all partners.

questions.question: Can I specialize in a specific industry?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Many partners focus on specific verticals like manufacturing, retail, or services. We'll help you specialize.
